---
name: Incident
about: Open and track a PlaidCloud platform incident
title: "[Incident] <short user-facing summary>"
labels: ''
assignees: ''
---

<!--
HOW THIS WORKS:
- Add a label matching the affected component slug so the incident links on the status page:
    app | docs | website
- Post each new update as a COMMENT on this issue (don't edit the original).
- CLOSE the issue to mark the incident resolved.
- First update within 15 minutes of confirming the incident. Plain language, no internal jargon,
  no secrets/customer data (this repo is public).
-->

**Status:** Investigating  <!-- Investigating → Identified → Monitoring → Resolved -->
**Severity:** Degraded performance  <!-- Degraded performance | Partial outage | Major outage -->
**Affected:** <components>
**Started (UTC):** <YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MMZ>

### Impact
What users are experiencing, in plain language.

### Current update
What we know right now and what we're doing about it.
